log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:15+4=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:16+4=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 44/67
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 11]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 15 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 29/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:12+4=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS — no longer paralyzed.
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Kalashtar — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 16] FAIL! 3 psychic damage. HP: 167/178
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Kalashtar — Bardic Musician.
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician healed for 6 HP. HP: 35/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 33 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 2/67
→ Kalashtar — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 14 vs DC 16]
Young Red Dragon attacks Kalashtar — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Kalashtar — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
